Personal Banking

Everyday accounts and tools designed around how you actually spend, save, and plan for the future.

Built around real life, not fine print

  • No minimum balance on any account
  • Free instant transfers between your accounts
  • Real-time spending notifications
  • Cancel or freeze a card in seconds

Checking

No minimum balance, no monthly maintenance fees, instant access to your money.

Savings

Competitive, transparent rates on every dollar you set aside — no tiers, no fine print.

Investment

A dedicated account to start building long-term wealth alongside everyday banking.

Open your first account in under three minutes — no branch visit required.
